what_it_does: Defines an SVG upward chevron icon using one stroked path inside a 24x24 viewBox.
observations: Root svg uses xmlns, viewBox, fill, stroke, stroke-width, stroke-linecap, and stroke-linejoin attributes.
The icon has no fill and uses currentColor for its stroke.
A single path draws the chevron from left lower point to top center to right lower point.
standouts: The stroke color is inherited through currentColor.
The shape is expressed as one open path.
conventions: Uses rounded line caps and joins.
Uses stroke-based icon styling with fill set to none.
concerns: No title, description, role, or aria attributes are included in the SVG itself.
notes: A small reusable SVG asset for an upward chevron, with color controlled by its rendering context.
questions: Is accessibility labeling expected to be supplied by the consuming component?
purpose_vs_actual: The path and filename align: this file renders an upward chevron icon.
intention_signals: It appears intended to provide a reusable chevron-up icon whose color adapts to the surrounding UI context.
contribution: Provides a theme-colored upward chevron SVG asset suitable for disclosure, navigation, or directional UI controls.
summary_for_embedding: SVG asset defining an upward chevron icon on a 24x24 viewBox with a currentColor rounded stroke and no fill.
intention_for_embedding: This was for supplying a reusable upward chevron icon that can inherit UI color from its context.
